measurement_note: Size is n, the Patients row count. The legal 64/256/1024 all-matching tiers span 16x and use reverse insertion order. The remotely Accepted boundary-safe filter scans total condition text in O(S), while the deterministic app-local order is conservatively O(S + n log n). An independent same-class filter passes. A correct cross join grouped back to one row per patient processes n^2 pairs, completes every tier, and is rejected only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 64 matching patients in reverse insertion order
benchmark: 256 matching patients in reverse insertion order
benchmark: 1024 matching patients in reverse insertion order
